title: Cobblemon Uncovered
description: Cobblemon Uncovered adds Gyms, Gym Leaders, Mega Evolutions, TMs & TRs, rideable Cobblemon, iconic towns, and more — filling the gaps for a full Cobblemon adventure.
body:
---

# 🌿Cobblemon Uncovered!  
### _The Wild is waiting for you._

---

## 📄About the Modpack

Cobblemon Uncovered is a **personal modpack** originally made for my own world to enjoy Cobblemon as I liked, but now here I am sharing it with everyone!   

🔹**Note:** This pack is still a **Work-in-Progress** which means I will be releasing new updates, making some tweaks, adding a few mods here and there, and possibly removing some too.   

Explore, battle, and uncover the wild mysteries waiting for you.  
Built around Cobblemon and handpicked quality-of-life mods, resource packs, and datapacks, this pack is designed for those who seek adventure, discovery, and a fun filled journey!

---

<details>
<summary>Important Notes</summary>

- This modpack was made **just for personal fun** and now it's shared with the community too!  
- Always consider supporting the original mod creators as much as you can!

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Credits & Thanks</summary>

Special **thanks** to:

- **The Cobblemon Team** for building the incredible foundation behind this adventure.  
- **All the awesome creators** of APIs, libraries, mods, dependencies, datapacks, resource packs, and shaders none of this would be possible without you!  
- Thanks for making our experience better luv u all! :kiss:

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Features Highlight</summary>

- A beautifully enhanced Cobblemon experience,  
- Smooth world generation,  
- Adventure focused quality of life mods,  
- Custom towns you’ll actually remember, wild encounters, and exploration centered gameplay,  
- Cozy atmosphere perfect for solo or casual play,  
- Optimizations and many more engaging mods.

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Work in Progress Notes</summary>

- Will try my best to keep this modpack updated  
- Will fix any bugs or issues as fast as possible  
- Will keep adding cool features based on your feedback  
- Always open to new ideas or suggestions from the community

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

**Q: How much RAM is recommended**  
> 🖥️ At least **4 GB of allocated RAM** is recommended for a smooth experience

**Q: Can I play this modpack in multiplayer**  
> 🎮 Yes Cobblemon Uncovered is friendly for solo and multiplayer worlds

**Q: Will there be updates in the future**  
> 📅 100% Since this pack is a WIP more content will be added with time

**Q: What is the deal with this modpack is it really just for you**  
> 🔎 This modpack is based on my own personal use in my world I have now decided to share it as a **beta version** for others to try and give feedback While it has been used extensively there may still be some small issues to address I appreciate your patience as I work on fixing them If you find any bugs feel free to DM [**rijz.gg**](https://discord.com/users/1303959182201982989) on Discord for assistance

</details>

---
